bead.title: Stage 2.1: add gqlgen + scaffold + /graphql endpoint + GraphiQL
bead.description: Add gqlgen to go.mod. Create cli/internal/server/graphql/gqlgen.yml, resolver.go, generated/ (auto-gen'd). Wire POST /graphql and GET /graphiql in cli/internal/server/server.go. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 2 bead #14.
bead.acceptance: (1) `go run github.com/99designs/gqlgen generate` runs clean. (2) `go build ./...` passes. (3) `go test ./...` passes. (4) MANUAL: start `ddx server`, open `http://127.0.0.1:7743/graphiql`, run `{ __typename }`, see `{"data":{"__typename":"Query"}}`. Record the manual step in the bead's completion note.
